name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Premium polarized lenses that block 100% of UV rays. Perfect for beach days and driving.

name: Tropical Cotton Shirt
description: Breathable 100% organic cotton shirt with vibrant tropical prints for a cool summer vibe.

description: Non-greasy, water-resistant sunscreen with hyaluronic acid to keep your skin glowing.

description: Handmade spacious straw bag with leather handles. Ideal for carrying all your beach essentials.

name: Portable Cooling Fan
description: USB rechargeable mini fan with 3 speeds. Compact enough to fit in your pocket.
